description: fmt-004: LinkedIn authentication and RSS adapter integration across all 5 architecture layers

userStories.title: LinkedIn RSS adapter + Playwright auth in fetch.py
userStories.description: Add linkedin-rss adapter to fetch.py supporting rss.app feed URLs. Create linkedin_auth.py with Playwright browser auth and cookie persistence.
acceptanceCriteria: linkedin-rss adapter in fetch.py handles rss.app URLs
linkedin_auth.py provides Playwright-based auth with cookie storage

userStories.title: Phoenix LinkedIn auth endpoints + LiveView settings panel
userStories.description: Create Elixir linkedin_auth.ex module, add REST endpoints for auth status and authentication, extend LiveView with settings panel.
acceptanceCriteria: Authority controller auto-detects LinkedIn URLs and rss.app feeds
LiveView search_live.ex has settings panel with LinkedIn auth UI

userStories.title: SwiftUI LinkedIn auth banner + authority row integration
userStories.description: Add LinkedInAuthStatus model, API client methods, auth banner view, and LinkedIn-aware authority row controls in the macOS menubar app.
acceptanceCriteria: APIClient has linkedInAuthStatus() and linkedInAuth() methods
LinkedInAuthBannerView shows auth status in authorities panel
SearchViewModel manages LinkedIn auth state and async flows
